response:
<<The Path of the Chief>>

The chief walks with purpose,  
A leader of the people, bold and true.  
His journey is a tale of strength,  
A tale of courage, never lost.

He guides with wisdom, deep and wise,  
A leader of the people, bold and true.  
His path is clear, his purpose set,  
A leader of the people, bold and true.

He stands for justice, for peace,  
A leader of the people, bold and true.  
His heart is pure, his spirit high,  
A leader of the people, bold and true.

He serves with honor, with grace,  
A leader of the people, bold and true.  
His legacy is written in the skies,  
A leader of the people, bold and true.
